name: Excel Download for Security Groups Report
description: An ⬇ Excel export button is available for security group detail dialog to streamline copy/paste of the dialog.

name: Curated Additional Data Catalog Sources
description: Included the DEVOPS Wiki pages to define additional data sources in the synapse data warehouse.

name: Azure Security Groups and Access Report Includes Local Databricks Users
description: This report now includes the Databricks local account users.  These are users setup directly in Databricks and not in Azure Security Groups.

name: All Reports designate timezone
description: Reports now indicate on the refresh date and time the timezone.  In most instances it will be EDT or EST (with or without daylight savings).

name: Schema Pills in Data Catalog
description: Now you can click on a schema from the Data Catalog report and a new page will open in the Synapse Metadata Report at the schema for inspection.

name: Timestamp Color Coding
description: Each report is now colored coded green, yellow and red to indicate how fresh the report is as reflected on the main IDOH Metadata Marketplace page.

name: Shared Feedback Persistence
description: Feedback and suggestions now save to a Databricks Delta table and are visible to all users in real time. Entries from both the Index and Help pages appear in a single shared log tagged with their source page.

name: Alignment of Help Cards on the Index page
description: The cards on the index page are now grouped in 3 columns to appear more cohesive and less wasted space and scrolling.

name: ADLS2 Improved Utility
description: Improved the ADLS2 to show 6 levels deep into the folders as well as collapsing the side bar upon intial display for better bearings.

name: Select Table Columns
description: There is a new tab called Select which will show you a simple query statement of all the columns in the corresponding table.

name: Correct Datatypes on Synapse Tables
description: Remove the length field for INT and BIGINT on column descriptions.

name: Synapse DDL Improvemnt
description: Included missing distribution and indexing of table descriptions.

name: ADF Activity Performance
description: Created a new tab inside of the ADF Metadata Report showing the performance of activities including start, end, duration, I/O.
